title: Isolation of nuclei from paraffin-embedded tissue with subsequent immunostaining
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"84t1m","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8akt8","text":"This protocol describes how individual nuclei are isolated from paraffin tissue and then stained immunhistochemically","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"48vav","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"99a22","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9glh9","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"30gjq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8srr5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: cut 60µm sections from paraffin material and add to an 1,5ml tube
dewaxing by addition of xylene; 99%; 96%: 70% Ethanol each for 60:00:00 Room temperature remove and replace after incubation
after removing the last rehydration step add Target Retrieval Solution 400 µL Target Retrieval Solution pH9 Dako Catalog #S2367

add 0,2mm diameter stainless steel beads place the tube in a homogenizer such as (Homognizer, Bullet Blender storm 24, NA-BB-15, https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/public/997f9bb90e59ec7110eb03c8d955177ffe220317473f7c373db40ca27d3007ee/bsfg9sa6.pdf ) homogenize for 02:00:00 max. speed. There should be no more large pieces of tissue to be seen. check the result, repeat if necessary
The heat induced epitope retrieval (HIER) in the water bath follows. Place the tube in a preheated water bath 98 °C 60:00:00 allow the tube to cool at room temperature for 30:00:00
remove the buffer by centrifugation 5000 rpm, 5min. discard supernatant
add 1x IHC- washing buffer IHC-Waschpuffer resuspend pellet by vortexing repeat step 7

prepare the antibody diluent composite Dako Real Antibody Diluent 0,5% Saponin 2% BSA Dako REAL Antibody Diluent Dako Catalog #S2022 Saponin AppliChem Catalog #A4518.0100 (CAS: 8047-15-2) BSA Carl Roth Catalog #0163.2
after centifugation discard supernatant start equilibration add antibody diluent composite 400 µL resuspend the pellet incubate Room temperature 30:00:00

Addition of the primary Antibody The concentration must be determined for each antibody. Incubation 16:00:00, over Night 4 °C by agitation (Rotator, Stuart Rotator SB3, SB3, http://www.stuart-equipment.de/product.asp?dsl=137 , https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/public/997f9bb90e59ec7110eb03c8d955177ffe220317473f7c373db40ca27d3007ee/bsfq9sa6.pdf )
centrifugation, 5000 rpm, 5min. discard the supernatant add IHC Waschpuffer IHC-Waschpuffer repeat once
preparation of the secondary antibody in the antibody diluent composite in a predetermined concentration mix well incubation Room temperature 60:00:00
store in Aqua dest 4 °C if necessary

centrifugation 5000 rpm, 5min. Centrifuge (Benchtop Centrifuge, Eppendorf, 5405000441, Any benchtop centrifuge will suffice, https://online-shop.eppendorf.us/US-en/Centrifugation-44533/Centrifuges-44534/Centrifuge-5425-PF-243560.html ) discard the supernatant add Target Retrieval Solution once. 400 µL

We performed fluorescence immonostaining for 3D reconstruction with laser-scanning microscope (Leica TCS SP8) afterwards. If a dapi staining is necessary, it can be connected at the end. Dapi staining should be performed immediately before microscopy.
creator: Dorothe Moellmann
